title: Reclaim async: true for a module that uses Mox
prompt: A test module is currently `async: false` because it uses `Mox` to stub `MyApp.HttpClient`. Write `test/my_app/http_consumer_test.exs` that: (1) `use MyApp.DataCase, async: true`, (2) uses `Mox.set_mox_private(self())` in setup so each async test has its own expectations, (3) stubs `MyApp.HttpClient.get/1` to return `{:ok, %{"status" => "ok"}}`, (4) tests a function that calls HttpClient and inserts a record. Must NOT use `Mox.set_mox_global/0`.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing Mox has a private-vs-global distinction AND choosing the async-safe variant.
